metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2328
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.4: "Direct aggregation of NGL-3 on the surface of dendrites induces coclustering of excitatory postsynaptic proteins"
Fig.5: "Knockdown of NGL-3 leads to decreases in the number and function of excitatory synapses"
Fig.8: "LAR expressed in non-neural cells induces excitatory postsynaptic differentiation in contacting dendrites". Experimental description: Dissociated culture is of rat species: " Briefly, primary hippocampal neuron cultures at 10 d in vitro (10 DIV) prepared from embryonic day 18-19 (E18-19) rats were cocultured with HEK293T cells expressing NGLs, LAR or EGFP, followed by immunostaining at 13 DIV. "

15/01/2018 Pim
- Overexpressed LRRC4b is of rat species: "Full-length human NGL-1 (NM_020929, amino acids 1-641) and rat NGL-3 (XM_218615, amino acids 1-709) were subcloned into pEGFP-N1 (Clontech)."
